channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ted Cruz Endorses Alan Wilson Ahead of South Carolina GOP Runoff
item.description: Senator Ted Cruz endorsed South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson in the state's competitive Republican gubernatorial runoff.

item.title: Trump Thanks Cohen for Supporting Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: President Donald Trump thanked his former attorney Michael Cohen after Cohen unexpectedly voiced support for an anti-weaponization fund.

item.title: Trump bet tariffs would bring back American factory jobs. New report says it didn't work
item.description: A new report claims Trump's Liberation Day tariffs suppressed hiring by up to 1 million jobs and cost families roughly $1,000 more in 2025.

item.title: Trump heads to G7 with Iran deal momentum, trade fights waiting
item.description: Trump joins G7 summit to discuss trade, artificial intelligence, China dependency, and NATO amid America First tariff tensions.
